ogTitle: Kosciuszko National Park vs Kotara South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kosciuszko National Park and Kotara South.
heading: Kosciuszko National Park vs Kotara South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kosciuszko National Park, New South Wales and Kotara South, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kotara South has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Kosciuszko National Park (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kosciuszko National Park or Kotara South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kosciuszko National Park has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Kotara South scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kosciuszko National Park scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Kotara South scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kosciuszko National Park or Kotara South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kotara South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
